message:
test(agent): Add comprehensive agent compatibility integration tests

Add tests/integration/agent_compat_tests.rs with 19 test cases ensuring
AI coding agents always receive plain, parseable output (bd-1p9c).

Test coverage includes:
- 15 agent environment variables (CLAUDE_CODE, CURSOR_AI, etc.)
- 12 CI environment variables (CI, GITHUB_ACTIONS, etc.)
- 6 IDE environment variables (VSCODE, CODESPACES, etc.)
- Robot mode (--robot flag and ROBOT_MODE env)
- NO_COLOR standard compliance
- JSON format validation
- Error output in agent mode
- Combined environment scenarios

All tests verify:
- No ANSI escape codes in output
- No Unicode box drawing characters
- No fancy Unicode/emoji
- Machine-parseable line-based format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
